features: Care routine: 5-piece set with the most important nail care instruments for daily manicure and pedicure from the Classic series
Design: Black cowhide case with press stud closure and velvet lining on the inside. Ergonomic shape of the instruments. Optimal companion for on the go or when travelling
Material: The instruments are made of high-quality, rust-free, satin-matt stainless steel, corrosion-resistant and nickel-free
Gift idea: Whether for yourself or for giving as a gift. For Christmas, Valentine's Day or birthdays
Scope of delivery: Consisting of 2-in-1 combined nail scissors, nail clipper, slanted tweezers, 2-in-1 manicure instrument and a sapphire nail file
description: The 5-piece functional nail care set offers a practical combination of high-quality instruments for the care of fingernails and toenails. Inside the high-quality black cowhide case with press stud closure, a nail clipper, nail and cuticle scissors, a sapphire nail file, a cuticle pusher and cleaner and slanted tweezers are stored safely and clearly arranged. The ZWILLING Beauty instruments are manufactured from rust-free, polished stainless steel and offer functionality, durability and corrosion resistance in proven ZWILLING quality.
